name: Honey Twist Coffee Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Lemon juice (or Juice of 1 lemon)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften yeast in water.
2. Cream butter, salt, and sugar. Add slightly beaten eggs, lemon juice (or 1 lemon), nutmeg, and milk (mix equal parts water and canned milk). Stir in flour, keeping the dough softer than for a loaf bread. Knead on lightly floured pastry cloth.
3. Place dough in greased bowl and brush top lightly with fat. Cover and let rise in warm place until doubled in bulk.
4. Shape into long roll about 1 inch in diameter. Coil loosely in greased 9-inch layer pan or an 8x8x2-inch pan, beginning at the outer edge.
5. Mix honey topping ingredients and brush on dough. Let it rise until doubled in bulk.
6. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes. Cool slightly, then mix icing by gradually adding boiling water to powdered sugar until it flows freely from a spoon. Add vanilla.
